findings.description: Source h2 section '拡張例' contains 3 h3 subsections (エラー時のレスポンスにメッセージを設定する / 特定のエラーの場合に個別に定義したエラーレスポンスを返却する / クライアントに返すレスポンスに共通処理を追加する) and exceeds 2000 chars of plain text, but the knowledge file consolidates all three into a single section s6 without splitting.
findings.source_evidence: RST source has three ~~~~~ (h3) subsections under 拡張例, each with substantial Java and XML code examples totalling well over 2000 characters of content.

findings.description: Hint 'NoDataException' is missing from s6. It is an XxxException class name explicitly referenced in the source code example ('throwable instanceof NoDataException') and should be included per hints completeness rules for exception names.
findings.source_evidence: Source code in '特定のエラーの場合に個別に定義したエラーレスポンスを返却する': `if (throwable instanceof NoDataException) { return new HttpResponse(404); }`
